summary: The user is seeking new recipe ideas to diversify their meal prep routine, having recently made Chicken Fajitas every Wednesday for two weeks. They express interest in Quinoa Salad Jars and Lentil Soup, and discuss their experimentation with spices, particularly in making an Indian-inspired lentil curry, while also considering homemade naan as a side.
facts: The user has been making Chicken Fajitas every Wednesday for the past two weeks. The user has been cooking dinner at home at least 4-5 times a week. The user has stocked up on cumin, smoked paprika, and garam masala for cooking. The user has been experimenting with roasting Brussels sprouts and sweet potatoes to serve with their lentil curry. The user has been making an Indian-inspired lentil curry that has become a staple in their meal rotation. The user serves their lentil curry with quinoa as a base. The user is considering adding a dollop of yogurt or sour cream to their lentil curry for balance. The user has been wanting to make homemade naan bread to serve with their curry.
